name: What should I do first if I can only afford a little?
description: Fix your top pages and core profiles first; a few strong pages are usually better than many weak ones.

mainEntity.name: What should I do first if I can only afford a little?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you have limited budget, start with the pages that answer your highest-intent customer questions and clean up your core business profiles. A small number of well-structured pages usually beats a large content project that never gets cited.
acceptedAnswer.description: Fix your top pages and core profiles first; a few strong pages are usually better than many weak ones.
